yes, there are two ways to view logs and models:

**1. Via `fuyao shell` (live, inside running container):**

```bash
# List model checkpoints
fuyao shell --job-name <job_name> -- ls /model/<task_name>/

# Check training logs
fuyao shell --job-name <job_name> -- ls /code/humanoid-gym/logs/
```

The FFF URL is: `https://xrobot.xiaopeng.link/fuyao-file-finder`

```
https://xrobot.xiaopeng.link/resource/xrobot-log/user-upload/fuyao/huh8/bifrost-2026031307552101-huh8/
```
